caption: The video displays a series of animated graphics for a news organization against a dark red background. Initially, a blue 3D block with the word "NEWS" in white capital letters is shown, with a red square containing the number "18" positioned above it. As the sequence progresses, the scene shifts to a bright, stylized visual featuring the same "NEWS 18" logo, accompanied by the word "इंडिया" written in Hindi script. The final frames stabilize into a centered composition where the blue "NEWS" text and red "18" square sit directly above the white Hindi text "इंडिया". A bright light source glows from behind the text, creating a lens flare effect and illuminating the red, grid-like floor beneath the logo. There are no people or physical locations present, as the footage consists entirely of motion graphics and digital branding.
